---
title: "**Winter 2025 Graduates in Scotland**"
date: 2025-12-01
image: /gallery/images/bertha-odawa-1.jpeg
image-alt: "Winter 2025 Graduates in Scotland"
categories: [Gallery]
format:
  html:
    lightbox: auto
    page-layout: full
---

We are thrilled to celebrate the achievements of Kenyan graduates across Scotland. This gallery honours our Winter 2025 graduates, beginning with those from **The University of Glasgow**.

---

## 🎓 The University of Glasgow

### 👩🏾‍🎓 Bertha Odawa  
*Master of Science in Public Policy and Management*

::: {layout-ncol=2}

![Bertha Odawa smiling through a gold picture frame at the University of Glasgow World Changers backdrop](/gallery/images/bertha-odawa-1.jpeg){group="bertha" description="Bertha celebrates her graduation at The University of Glasgow with joy and confidence, framed beautifully against the World Changers display."}

![Bertha Odawa standing proudly in her graduation gown against a University of Glasgow backdrop](/gallery/images/bertha-odawa-2.jpeg){group="bertha" description="Bertha marks her MSc graduation in style, standing proudly in her gown at The University of Glasgow."}

![Bertha Odawa holding a bouquet of sunflowers outside a historic University of Glasgow building](/gallery/images/bertha-odawa-3.jpg){group="bertha" description="A bright and memorable graduation moment as Bertha poses with sunflowers on the University of Glasgow campus."}

![Bertha Odawa smiling in her graduation gown under the arches at the University of Glasgow](/gallery/images/bertha-odawa-4.jpg){group="bertha" description="Bertha celebrates her achievement with elegance and pride beneath the iconic arches of The University of Glasgow."}

:::

---

More universities and graduates will be added soon. If you would like to be featured, please [get in touch](/contact.qmd).

*#KenyanCommunityInScotland #KenyanScots #KenyansInUK #KenyansInDiaspora #Graduation2025*
